activities_projects.title: Diagonal Square Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the diagonal creates a square with double area
steps: Draw a square of side 4 cm
Construct a square on the diagonal
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands geometric relation between square and its diagonal
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct construction and area comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Half-Area Square Construction
activities_projects.objective: Construct a square whose area is half of a given square
steps: Draw a square of side 8 cm
Join the midpoints of all sides
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognizes geometric methods to reduce area
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct explanation of half-area property (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Hypotenuse Bounds Activity
activities_projects.objective: Estimate the value of √2 using bounds
steps: Find squares of decimals between 1.4 and 1.5
Identify numbers whose square is close to 2

activities_projects.title: Triangle Hypotenuse Calculator
steps: Draw a right triangle with sides 5 cm and 12 cm
Calculate the square of both sides
Find the hypotenuse using the theorem

activities_projects.title: Missing Side Finder
activities_projects.objective: Find unknown side lengths in right triangles
steps: Given a right triangle with hypotenuse 17 cm and one side 8 cm

activities_projects.title: Square Combination Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Combine two squares of different areas
steps: Draw squares of side 3 cm and 4 cm
Form a right triangle using these sides
Construct a square on the hypotenuse
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands that a² + b² = c² geometrically

activities_projects.title: Rectangle Diagonal Investigation
steps: Draw rectangle with sides 6 cm and 8 cm

activities_projects.title: Real Life Lotus Problem
steps: Model lotus problem using a right triangle
